reviews.comment:
Excelente lugar. Para hacer una parada. Descansar a la sombra en las mesitas y los sanitarios bien limpios. Personal muy amable.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent place. Perfect for a stop. Relax in the shade at the tables, and the restrooms are very clean. Very friendly staff.

reviews.comment:
La verdad un robo con el agua para el mate !!! Hace un mes me cobraron $20 la ficha hoy año nuevo $100... Una vergüenza.. Sepan que en la Shell es agua es gratis!!!

(Translated by Google)
Honestly, it's a rip-off with the water for mate! A month ago they charged me $20 for a token, and today, on New Year's Day, it's $100... It's outrageous! Just so you know, at Shell, water is free!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNCbmJ6WGNBEAE

reviews.comment:
Excelente lugar para hacer una parada en el camino.
Los baños son muy limpios.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent place to stop along the way.
The restrooms are very clean.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNCN2VUOHhRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Café rico pero un curro por donde se lo mire. Pedí un café con leche y me cobraron el late que era 150$ más caro, habiendo un cartel con las dos opciones. Pedí el cambio y me dijeron que así lo cobraban. Roban sin disimulo.

(Translated by Google)
Delicious coffee, but a rip-off from every angle. I ordered a latte and was charged $150 more for a latte, even though there was a sign showing both options. I asked for change, and they told me that's how they charged. They're openly stealing.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNCN2VDTkZ3EAE

reviews.comment:
Malísima la YPF para comprar un almuerzo. Demoran mucho en entregar los pedidos cuando los empleados se confunden te echan la culpa. No volveremos a parar
Aquí.

(Translated by Google)
YPF is terrible for getting lunch. They take forever to deliver orders, and when the employees make a mistake, they blame you. We won't be stopping here again.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNCdGRIelBREAE

reviews.comment:
El mejor lugar para descansar, en la ruta a Mar del Plata. Además de cargar combustible,   reponerse en el Full con buen aire acondicionado y WiFi, y lo principal, el parquecito con mesas y bancos,muy bien arbolada. Ideal también si vas con mascotas!

(Translated by Google)
The best place to rest on the way to Mar del Plata. In addition to refueling, you can refuel at the Full Service Car Park with good air conditioning and Wi-Fi. And most importantly, the small park with tables and benches and lots of trees. Also ideal if you're traveling with pets!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNCNVppdXp3RRAB
